profile_route.source: Pinned RCH fmd fj-lax linalg profile after pass179 closeout
profile_route.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-pass181 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg --quick --noplot

top_rows.decision: dominant profile row; previous exact-order row-tile and Schur-output families were measured rejects, so this pass used output-write avoidance instead of row-width retuning

profile_route.alien_primitive: memory-traffic output-write avoidance: remove a full m*n result prefill where the GEMM kernel overwrites every output from explicit zero accumulators

lever.description: Skip the unconditional result.fill(0.0) in matmul_2d_with_threads_into for nonzero-k products, and zero only the row-remainder block that still uses += accumulation.

same_worker_gate.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-lqjov-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot
same_worker_gate.candidate_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-lqjov-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64 --quick --noplot

isomorphism: For k > 0, full MRxNR tiles are written from zero local accumulators and never need the caller buffer pre-cleared.
The KC-blocked path still seeds the first pc block from zero and subsequent pc blocks from the running C value, preserving the same ascending-k recurrence for every output element.
The nonblocked column-remainder path still assigns scalar sums directly after ascending-k accumulation.
The row-remainder path is locally zeroed before its unchanged l-major += loop, preserving the previous starting value and per-output accumulation order.
For k == 0, the function still fills the result with zeros before returning.
Thread row ownership, B panel packing layout, tile traversal, dtype, shape, error behavior, NaN and signed-zero surfaces, and RNG absence are unchanged.

proof_commands.result: 11 passed; 0 failed; 1 ignored; includes matmul_2d_into_matches_allocating_path, blocked/packed/threaded bit-identity, special-value bit-identity, and packed NR8 golden digest

validation.result: exit 0; no criticals, no unsafe blocks, fmt/clippy/check/test-build clean; broad pre-existing warning inventory remains

decision.reason: Same-worker fmd GEMM2048 median improved from 176.69 ms to 158.03 ms; conservative interval speedup is 1.07239x; Score 8.0.
decision.next_primitive: Reprofile after landing. If GEMM remains top, route to a deeper communication-avoiding or tolerance-contract primitive rather than repeating row-tile/MR-width microlevers.
